summary: STATIC verification of PixelFlow Android Kotlin/Compose UI-fidelity fixes. 11 of 12 checks PASS. One FAIL: user-facing copy in PremiumScreen.kt still contains the phrase 'no AI' (line 89), violating the zero-'AI'-in-copy rule from §2. All button shapes/colors, top-bar alignment, bottom-nav oval pill (56x32), WelcomeIllustration, FactorPill, WelcomeScreen gradient CTA, HomeScreen back-arrow, UpscaleScreen 3+2x2 FactorPill layout, CompressScreen Compare overlay + Download High-Res label, and absence of android.permission.INTERNET are all verified correctly. Environment cannot compile Kotlin/Gradle so only static checks were performed as instructed.

ui_bugs.issue: User-visible Text still reads 'Remove all limits. Same tools. Same privacy. No ads, no watermarks, no AI.' — violates §2 zero-AI-in-copy rule. Reference: /app/PixelFlow-Android/app/src/main/java/com/pixelflow/app/ui/screens/premium/PremiumScreen.kt:89

HomeScreen passes onBack = { nav.navigateUp() }, but Home is the root of the main graph (Welcome pops itself with popUpTo(WELCOME){inclusive=true}). nav.navigateUp() on the root is a no-op, so the back arrow will render but do nothing — this is a dead affordance and likely a UX regression from the previous left-aligned title. Reference: /app/PixelFlow-Android/app/src/main/java/com/pixelflow/app/ui/screens/home/HomeScreen.kt:71

issues: Two nested empty Boxes (lines 79-97) inside the 'processing ring' render nothing useful (Color.Transparent). Cosmetic clutter — safe to delete. Reference: /app/PixelFlow-Android/app/src/main/java/com/pixelflow/app/ui/components/WelcomeIllustration.kt:79-97

action_items: Remove the phrase 'no AI' from the user-visible subtitle in PremiumScreen.kt line 89 (e.g., change to 'No ads, no watermarks, no tracking.' or similar).

Reconsider passing onBack on HomeScreen — either remove the back arrow (title left-aligned as before), or wire it to a meaningful action. Currently nav.navigateUp() on the start destination is a no-op.
Optional cleanup in WelcomeIllustration.kt: delete dead nested transparent Boxes (lines 79-97) and the unused _t line 168.
critical_code_review_comments: Icons.Filled.Compare is a valid symbol from material-icons-extended, and app/build.gradle.kts:67 includes libs.androidx.compose.material.icons.extended — compile OK.
AndroidManifest.xml correctly omits android.permission.INTERNET; only READ_MEDIA_IMAGES and legacy READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE are declared — offline-first invariant satisfied.
All 12 requested testTags and colors match the requested spec (PrimaryDeep #006D41 via theme constant, PrimaryLight for pill fills, RoundedCornerShape(999.dp) pills at 60dp / 48dp / 56x32 oval).
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a native Android Kotlin+Compose project at /app/PixelFlow-Android/ delivered as source-only. The container has no Android SDK / JDK 17 / Gradle wrapper JAR, so ONLY static file inspection is possible — do not attempt gradle, adb, curl or Playwright. Reference each check to /app/PixelFlow-Android/app/src/main/....
rca_of_issue: Single functional deviation from spec: PremiumScreen.kt line 89 leaks the token 'AI' into user-facing copy. Root cause = writer intended the phrase as a negation ('no AI'), but the spec forbids the word appearing anywhere in copy regardless of framing. Mitigation: replace 'no AI' with a neutral privacy-focused phrase (e.g., 'no cloud uploads' or 'nothing leaves your device') and re-grep the tree with 'grep -rnE "\\bAI\\b" app/src/main' — expect 0 hits outside of code comments (comments are acceptable per convention).
